title: SΔϕ-45 - When Systems Win Before They Are Declared Victorious
package_title: SΔϕ-45 - When Systems Win Before They Are Declared Victorious: Foretold Victory, Priced Function, and Public-Form Residuals AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / foretold-victory public-form residual audit module
core_claim: A system begins to win before victory is declared when alternatives remain formally available but become too costly to restore as livable paths.

primary_formulae.core: Foretold Victory = Public Form Remaining + Priced Function Migration + Restoration Cost Inflation + Baseline Trust Collapse + Rollback Imagination Weakening
primary_formulae.expanded: Foretold Victory = Public Form Remaining + Priced Function Migration + Safety/Recovery/Ascent Stratification + Restoration Cost Inflation + Baseline Trust Collapse + Rollback Imagination Weakening + Reopening Affordability Decline + Exception Transmissibility Failure
primary_formulae.compact: Public form remains. Functional path migrates. Restoration cost inflates. Coercion becomes realism. The system begins to win.

do_not_use_as: proof of totalitarian control by itself
proof that public form means real function
proof that formal alternatives are viable alternatives
proof that foretold victory equals completed victory
